      209
      210 +**RESOLVED.** Verified by t009-verify: `DoneSessionSweeperWorker` in `murder/workers/done_session_sweeper.py`, registered in bootstrap, sweeps every 60s.
      211 +
      212  ---
      213
      214  ## description — Frame Pair Analysis (TUI screen recordings)

● Update(.murder/notes/June4Roundup.md)
  ⎿  Added 2 lines
      171
      172  Originally suspected: rapid j/k navigation between notes/plans crashes the TUI. Root cause turned out to be unrelated: `sidecar_sync._meta_from_row` during service startup
            — `TicketRecord` lacked `__contains__`, causing `"schedule_at" in row` to raise `KeyError: 0`. Fixed in `records.py` (t008). No separate j/k TUI crash path was found.
      173
      174 +**RESOLVED BY: t008** — fix in `records.py`.
      175 +
      176  ---
      177
      178  ## image-paste-passthrough-codex (2026-06-04)

● The roundup is complete. Here's a summary of what was done:

  ---
  Roundup complete. June4Roundup.md now covers all 34 notes (+ retired_notes directory). Resolution status:

  Confirmed RESOLVED:
  - escalation-ack-keyboard-nav — escalation resolve wizard + focus keybind (e/a) fully implemented
  - crows-view — all 5 requested features implemented (CrowRosterRow, favorite, ctrl+m kill, pane toggle, color-coded status)
  - ctrlshortcuts — ctrl+d/ctrl+p implemented in chat_input.py:324-336
  - scrollsnap — LiveRichLog preserves manual scroll position
  - done-cleanup — DoneSessionSweeperWorker verified by t009-verify
  - jk-crash — fixed in records.py (t008)
  - writeset-loop-dirty-worktree — write_set concept deleted entirely (dfce0ae)
  - shutdown-down-wait-for-exit — partially mitigated (cb1c365), full fix still outstanding

  Confirmed STILL OPEN:
  - shortcut-failure — chat_target_cycle.py:27 filters out planners with no active agent; fix: remove status filter
  - image-paste-passthrough-codex — image path sent as text only; file never copied to crow workspace

✻ Baked for 8m 47s

❯ make a ticket for the shortcut-failure fix
